sglang.author: hnyls2002

sglang.title: Revert "Eliminate 2 gpu ops during sampling when logit_bias is zero"
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Reverts #343.
Thanks @Qubitium for reminding me of inappropriate review/PR behaviors. This PR should be discarded.

sglang.title: Eliminate 2 gpu ops during sampling when logit_bias is zero
sglang.author: Qubitium
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Reason for PR: Eliminate 2 gpu ops during sampling when logit_bias is not used (all zeros)

skip allocation of logit_bias
skip applying logits.add_(self.logit_bias)

On our internal test of Yi-6B quantized using marlin on 4090 we see tangible improvement: up to 63% throughput improvement for small s

vllm.title: [Doc] Fix vLLMEngine Doc Page
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The documentation page is down again for vLLMEngine :(
I'm not sure why but this time we necessarily need to include both transformers and py-cpuinfo in requirements-docs.txt to make it work. See https://vllm--3791.org.readthedocs.build/en/3791/dev/engine/llm_engine.html for a working version.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] fix TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST in wheel build
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix the issues that current wheel build does not contain sm 7.0 / 7.5 binary.

vllm.title: Fix crash when try torch.cuda.set_device in worker
vllm.author: leiwen83
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The new usage status collector add vllm.model_executor.model_loader import which cause transformers start to init the context with the cuda environment which hasn't configured by _init_workers_ray@RayGPUExecutor with set_cuda_visible_devices func yet.
So that with wrong context inited, it would caus

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add `__init__.py` files for `vllm/core/block/` and `vllm/spec_decode/`
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds in __init__.py files for vllm/core/block/ and vllm/spec_decode/ so that those directories will be present in the wheel.
This is able to be easily reproduced by installing vllm from pypi and trying to import from these modules
python -m pip install vllm==0.4.0
python
>>> from vllm.core.block.int

vllm.title: [CI/Build] 0.4.0.post1, fix sm 7.0/7.5 binary
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Upgrade to 0.4.0.post1, to include the fix of sm 7.0/7.5 binary in prebuilt wheels.

vllm.title: [Speculative decoding] Adding configuration object for speculative decoding
vllm.author: cadedaniel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a subset of PR 6/9: Integrate speculative decoding with LLMEngine. in the speculative decoding open sourcing plan. It introduces a SpeculativeConfig and plumbs it through to the executors. The new flags are as follows:
parser.add_argument(
    '--speculative-model',
    type=str,
    defa

vllm.title: [BugFix] Use different mechanism to get vllm version in `is_cpu()`
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Using importlib.metadata.version() function doesn't work in the non-CPU docker image.
Introduced in #3634
Equivalent fix to #3735
